email.title: Forgot Password
email.subtitle: Enter the email associated with your Browntape account. We'll send you a reset link.

email_sent.title: Check your email
email_sent.subtitle: We sent a password reset link to {email}. Open the link to create a new password.

new_password.title: Create new password
new_password.subtitle: Your new password must be at least 8 characters.

success.title: Password updated
success.subtitle: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

invalid_email.title: Forgot Password
invalid_email.subtitle: Enter the email associated with your Browntape account. We'll send you a reset link.
invalid_email.error_message: No account found for this email address.

weak_password.error_message: Password must be at least 8 characters and match confirmation.

request.title: Login using OTP
request.subtitle: Enter your registered mobile number. We'll send a one-time password.

verify_empty.title: Verify it's you
verify_empty.subtitle: We sent a one-time password to {masked_phone}. Please enter the code below.

temporary.title: Account temporarily locked
temporary.message: Too many failed login attempts. Try again in {minutes} minutes or reset your password.

permanent.title: Account locked
permanent.message: Your account has been locked. Contact your administrator or visit the SSO Portal for help.

concurrent_login.title: Welcome back
concurrent_login.secondary_button: Log in with a different account
